claims.summary: Requested output budget is classified at exact 512/513 and 1024/1025 boundaries.
claims.disposition: Verify boundary tests and preserve requested budget separately from felt density.

claims.summary: Exact artifact markers are removed while nonempty lexical and structural remainder remains measurable.
claims.disposition: Verify marker, contextual, quoted, technical-expression, and remainder accounting tests.

claims.summary: Deep-budget stress and marker-as-meaning fixtures can compare truncation and artifact resonance.
claims.disposition: Route copied-output comparisons through bounded fallback evidence without changing prompts or responses.

claims.summary: Dynamic depth based on density or resonance would change prompt budget and provider behavior.
claims.disposition: Hold dynamic token allocation, prompt, threshold, and contextual marker changes behind exact Mike/operator approval.
